creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Automatich assignement does not work, if some has in the title category/portname@flavor.
Not many people use till now, but I think there will more in the future. Flavors are relative new, but we will have more in the near future. 
So I think some more people which mean this is more correct this in the title and it is not really good
if the assignement is not working, more cases.
